decision.next_action: Close critical evidence gaps before freezing a decision-grade packet.

components.label: ETH treasury fair value per share (May 31, 2026)
components.ownership_claim: ETH treasury fair value per share (May 31, 2026)
components.evidence: $10.856B ETH fair value divided by 579,652,432 shares at May 31, 2026 (10-Q Q3 FY2026 digital asset table). Low case applies ~40% ETH mark haircut from May marks.
components.scenario_assumptions: Look-through ETH per diluted common share before trajectory and operating overlays.
components.tax_and_realization_adjustments: Low case applies ETH mark haircut; high case modest premium to May marks.
components.falsifier: ETH fair value per share falls below the low case after sustained spot decline and further dilution.

components.label: Seven-year ETH price path net of ATM dilution
components.ownership_claim: Seven-year ETH price path net of ATM dilution
components.evidence: Base aligns with scenarios.base.sotp_build eth_growth_net_dilution (+$4.5/sh): 8% ETH CAGR for 7 years offset by 10% cumulative ATM dilution [Assumption]. Bear embeds dilution exceeding token appreciation.
components.scenario_assumptions: Incremental per-share value from ETH beta net of issuance, not double-counted with static look-through.

probability_and_timing.timing_basis: Seven-year Lawrence horizon aligned with yield-curve stance gate.
probability_and_timing.probability_basis: Base assumes moderate ETH appreciation with partial dilution offset; bear assumes dilution dominates.
probability_and_timing.remaining_capital_basis: Further ATM issuance is the primary remaining owner-funded dilution risk.

components.tax_and_realization_adjustments: Probability, timing, and dilution pace are inside the range.
components.falsifier: ATM issuance dilutes ETH per share faster than token price rises for two consecutive quarters.

components.label: Staking and legacy operating cash (capitalized)
components.evidence: Nine-month FY2026 staking and validation revenue $56.924M on 579.7M shares; modest margin capitalized at 10 times [Assumption] in base payoff build.
components.scenario_assumptions: Small operating annuity from staking yield; legacy mining immaterial.
components.tax_and_realization_adjustments: Does not double-count ETH fair value; yield is incremental operating cash.
components.falsifier: Staking yield falls below corporate G&A drag for two reporting periods.

components.label: Warrants, deferred tax, and preferred-claim reserve
components.ownership_claim: Warrants, deferred tax, and preferred-claim reserve
components.evidence: Warrant liability $2.1M and deferred tax liability $92.3M at May 31, 2026 (10-Q Q3 FY2026); BMNP preferred stock claims not fully modeled [HUMAN REVIEW].
components.scenario_assumptions: Reserve for senior claims and tax on unrealized crypto gains; base zero pending preferred waterfall.
components.tax_and_realization_adjustments: Negative additive; preferred waterfall pending [HUMAN REVIEW].
components.falsifier: Preferred or warrant conversion materially reduces common look-through below the low case.

valuation.interpretation: value_per_share is withheld while any material additive component is unpriced; priced_components_per_share is not a complete security value.

scenario_contract.rule: Cases must change cited causal operating, capital, probability, timing, or financing drivers—not only a terminal multiple.

change_control.rule: A source fact is locked. Every assumption change requires a reason, author, timestamp, and before/after value.

optionality.rule: Every option requires a beneficiary, probability, timing, remaining capital, failure case, and non-overlap control; absence of option value must be explicit rather than unvalued.

committee.strongest_dissent: The discount to May ETH marks is a rational price for an equity-financed dilution vehicle: management funds token purchases by issuing shares faster than ETH per share compounds, so the scarce asset on the balance sheet does not translate into a fixed pro-rata common claim.
unresolved_items: BMNP preferred stock conversion terms and post-May 2026 ATM dilution pace reconciled to net ETH per fully diluted common share after all senior claims.
Post-May 2026 ATM share issuance and ETH-per-diluted-share reconciled to BMNP preferred conversion and warrant waterfall.
Quantified post-May 2026 ATM issuance pace and BMNP preferred-stock waterfall per diluted common share, without which per-share asset realization cannot be bounded.
committee.next_action: Close the committee's primary-evidence blockers before requesting an owner decision.

gaps.question: BMNP preferred stock conversion terms and post-May 2026 ATM dilution pace reconciled to net ETH per fully diluted common share after all senior claims.
gaps.evidence_required: Resolve the committee's missing fact with primary evidence and update the affected valuation proof row.
gaps.acceptance_test: The committee item is explicitly closed, sourced, and reflected in the valuation range or documented as immaterial.

method_fit.label: Scarce assets, royalties, and optionality
applicability_tests: The security owns a legally enforceable economic claim on scarce assets or royalties.
Material value is omitted or poorly represented by current GAAP earnings.
Asset quantities, ownership, overlap, timing, and remaining capital can be reconciled.
Comparable values can be adjusted for location, quality, control, liquidity, and realization time.
failure_modes: gross asset value mistaken for shareholder value
operating cash flow and NAV counted twice
remote options treated as contracted cash

validation_cohort.purpose: Test depletion, commodity exposure, finite reserves, and royalty-unit reconciliation.
Test tangible capital, credit losses, funding, regulation, and excess-capital realization.
Test owner earnings, capital-light reinvestment, cyclicality, and buyback value creation.
Test normalized margins, industry supply response, replacement cost, and reinvestment timing.
Test product concentration, pipeline probabilities, patent cliffs, and catalyst timing.

method_fit.rule: Use one primary method and no more than two corroborating methods; irrelevant methods and personas remain silent.

outcomes.weighting_rule: Do not change a persona's relevance within a power zone until at least 20 attributable, dividend-aware outcomes exist there; never reweight automatically.

attribution.explanation: A complete security value is intentionally withheld while material components are unpriced. Attribution restarts after the first proof-complete baseline.
